body:
Sam, following up on the turquoise cuff and the bolo set you dropped at the gallery last month. Both moved over the weekend and a visitor asked whether you take commissions for a wider belt buckle in sterling with a single Kingman stone. I said you did. Can you send me a rough price and a turnaround so I can quote her properly.

Angela
snippet: Sam, following up on the turquoise cuff and the bolo set you dropped at the galle...
subject: Commission enquiry — belt buckle

body:
Angela, good news on the cuff. A wider buckle in sterling with one Kingman stone runs 480 to 560 depending on the stone and the overlay work. Four to five weeks once she settles on the stone. I have a couple of decent Kingman cabs on hand and can pull more from Thomas if she wants options. Send her my way and I will work up a proper quote.

Sam
snippet: Angela, good news on the cuff. A wider buckle in sterling with one Kingman stone...
subject: Re: Commission enquiry — belt buckle

body:
Sam, I am pulling together the table layout for the winter market in Santa Fe and wanted to confirm what you are bringing. So far I have you down for cuffs, two bolo ties and the stamped earrings. Are the buckles ready as well, or should I leave them off the list for now.

Thomas
snippet: Sam, I am pulling together the table layout for the winter market in Santa Fe an...
subject: Winter market table

body:
Thomas, the list looks right. Add the buckles, I will have three finished by then. I would also like to put out the coral pendants if there is room. I can be there to set up the night before. Tell me what time the doors open for vendors.

Sam
snippet: Thomas, the list looks right. Add the buckles, I will have three finished by the...
subject: Re: Winter market table

body:
Buckles and coral pendants added. Vendor setup is from six the evening before, doors to the public at nine. I saved you the corner spot by the window, better light for the silver. Bring your own table covers, they ran short last year.

Thomas
snippet: Buckles and coral pendants added. Vendor setup is from six the evening before, d...
subject: Re: Winter market table

body:
Sam, the inter-agency briefing on the Route 491 matter is moved to Friday at two. Captain Benally wants the timeline summary and the property log circulated beforehand. No need for full statements, just the logistics so everyone is working off the same dates. Can you have the summary to me by Thursday afternoon.

Eddie
snippet: Sam, the inter-agency briefing on the Route 491 matter is moved to Friday at two...
subject: Briefing moved to Friday

body:
Eddie, I will have the timeline and the property log to you by Thursday midday. Two things to settle before Friday: who is bringing the BIA liaison in, and whether the State Police want a copy of the log ahead of the room. I would rather sort that now than in front of the Captain.

Sam
snippet: Eddie, I will have the timeline and the property log to you by Thursday midday. ...
subject: Re: Briefing moved to Friday

body:
I will have the liaison there, spoke to him this morning. State Police asked for the log the day before so they can read in. I will send it over once you have it cleaned up. Captain also wants us to keep the room to thirty minutes, so lead with the dates and leave the rest for follow-up.

Eddie
snippet: I will have the liaison there, spoke to him this morning. State Police asked for...
subject: Re: Briefing moved to Friday

body:
Thirty minutes is plenty if we keep to the dates. I will send you the cleaned log tonight so State Police have it a day early. I will lead with the timeline, hand the liaison piece to you, and we leave the rest for follow-up as the Captain wants. See you Friday.

Sam
snippet: Thirty minutes is plenty if we keep to the dates. I will send you the cleaned lo...
subject: Re: Briefing moved to Friday

body:
Mr Osborne, this is a reminder that the parent-teacher evening at Mesa Vista High is next Wednesday from five to seven. Kai's maths and chemistry teachers have both asked to speak with you. Please sign in at the front office on arrival. If the time does not suit, reply and we will arrange a phone slot.

Mesa Vista HS Front Office
snippet: Mr Osborne, this is a reminder that the parent-teacher evening at Mesa Vista Hig...
subject: Parent-teacher evening Wednesday

body:
Thank you. Wednesday at five works. I will be there to see both the maths and chemistry teachers. If there is a sign-up sheet for time slots please put me down as early as you can, I have a market to prepare for that weekend.

Sam Osborne
snippet: Thank you. Wednesday at five works. I will be there to see both the maths and ch...
subject: Re: Parent-teacher evening Wednesday

body:
You are booked for five fifteen with maths and five forty with chemistry. Both teachers wanted you to know Kai is doing well this term, this is a general catch-up rather than anything of concern. The office closes at seven sharp so please arrive a few minutes early to sign in.

Mesa Vista HS Front Office
snippet: You are booked for five fifteen with maths and five forty with chemistry. Both t...
subject: Re: Parent-teacher evening Wednesday

body:
Noted, five fifteen and five forty. Good to hear she is keeping up. I will be there early to sign in. Thank you for sorting the slots.

Sam Osborne
snippet: Noted, five fifteen and five forty. Good to hear she is keeping up. I will be th...
subject: Re: Parent-teacher evening Wednesday

body:
Confirmed both slots in the system. One last thing, the chemistry teacher mentioned an optional field trip permission form went home with Kai this week. If you are happy for her to attend, sign it and she can bring it back. We can also hand you a copy on Wednesday if it has gone astray.

Mesa Vista HS Front Office
snippet: Confirmed both slots in the system. One last thing, the chemistry teacher mentio...
subject: Re: Parent-teacher evening Wednesday

body:
Hey Dad, are you free for lunch any day this week. I am out early Tuesday and Thursday so either works. Nothing fancy, I just want to catch up. Copper misses you taking him out too, he has been moping by the door. Let me know.

Kai
snippet: Hey Dad, are you free for lunch any day this week. I am out early Tuesday and Th...
subject: Lunch this week

body:
Thursday works. I am clear after one. How about the diner on Coal Avenue, the one with the green chile stew you like. I can pick you up from the house and we can take Copper round the block first so he stops sulking. One o'clock.

Dad
snippet: Thursday works. I am clear after one. How about the diner on Coal Avenue, the on...
subject: Re: Lunch this week

body:
Sam, the lapidary supplier in town is closing the turquoise account at the end of the month and wants to know if you are renewing the standing order. Prices on Kingman and Royston are up about fifteen per cent this year. They have added a cheaper grade that might do for the smaller pieces. Did not want it to lapse without checking with you.

Ben
snippet: Sam, the lapidary supplier in town is closing the turquoise account at the end o...
subject: Turquoise account renewal

body:
Ben, renew it but drop the standing quantity by a third, I have more stone on hand than I will get through before spring. I will take a small lot of the cheaper grade to try on the stamped earrings. Ask them to hold the better Kingman for the buckle commissions. I owe you for chasing this.

Sam
snippet: Ben, renew it but drop the standing quantity by a third, I have more stone on ha...
subject: Re: Turquoise account renewal

body:
Done, renewed at two thirds the quantity and they are setting aside the Kingman lot for you. I will run the cheaper grade out to the studio next time I am over from Shiprock, probably the weekend. Mum asked if you are still coming up for her birthday, you have not replied to her yet.

Ben
snippet: Done, renewed at two thirds the quantity and they are setting aside the Kingman ...
subject: Re: Turquoise account renewal

body:
Sam, your mother's birthday is the twelfth and I want to get plans moving before it sneaks up on us. I was thinking we drive up to Window Rock and take her to lunch, the place she likes by the park. Ben says he can come across from Shiprock. Kai wants to make her a card. Does the twelfth work for you or are you on shift.

Dorothy
snippet: Sam, your mother's birthday is the twelfth and I want to get plans moving before...
subject: Birthday lunch plans

body:
Mum, the twelfth is fine, I am off that day. Lunch by the park sounds right, book for four with Ben and Kai. I am making you a pair of earrings in the coral you liked, so no need to ask what I am bringing. Kai and I will drive up mid morning. Tell Ben to come hungry.

Sam
snippet: Mum, the twelfth is fine, I am off that day. Lunch by the park sounds right, boo...
subject: Re: Birthday lunch plans

body:
Coral earrings, you spoil me. I will book the table for four at noon. Bring Copper if you like, the patio allows dogs and he can sit with us. Drive carefully on the 264, they have been working on it past Yah-ta-hey. See you on the twelfth.

Dorothy
snippet: Coral earrings, you spoil me. I will book the table for four at noon. Bring Copp...
subject: Re: Birthday lunch plans

body:
Noon for four, noted. I will bring Copper, he could do with the run. I will watch for the roadworks. See you on the twelfth, Mum.

Sam
snippet: Noon for four, noted. I will bring Copper, he could do with the run. I will watc...
subject: Re: Birthday lunch plans

body:
Hello Mr Osborne, this is to confirm your Etsy order 4471 for one sterling and turquoise cuff has shipped. The cheaper grade stone you flagged for the earrings is back in stock if you wish to reorder. Your supplier account is up for its yearly renewal on the thirty-first. The standard tier went up but there is a maker tier that covers what you actually use for less.

Rio Grande Supply
snippet: Hello Mr Osborne, this is to confirm your Etsy order 4471 for one sterling and t...
subject: Order shipped and account renewal

body:
Thanks for the shipping note. Move me to the maker tier before the renewal date, I do not use the bench services on the standard tier. Confirm I keep the bulk silver sheet pricing and the next-day on findings, those are the two things I rely on. Send the new terms in writing for my records.

Sam
snippet: Thanks for the shipping note. Move me to the maker tier before the renewal date,...
subject: Re: Order shipped and account renewal

body:
Good news, both the bulk sheet pricing and next-day findings carry over to the maker tier this year. What you lose is the bench-service credit and the priority phone line, and your account shows you have used neither. We recommend the maker tier as you suggested. It saves about three hundred and forty over the year.

Rio Grande Supply
snippet: Good news, both the bulk sheet pricing and next-day findings carry over to the m...
subject: Re: Order shipped and account renewal

body:
That works. I have never needed the phone line, the catalogue covers it. Switch me to the maker tier before the renewal and email the confirmation with the new terms attached. Keep a copy on the account as well in case I need it later. Thanks for sorting it.

Sam
snippet: That works. I have never needed the phone line, the catalogue covers it. Switch ...
subject: Re: Order shipped and account renewal

body:
Done, you are on the maker tier and the confirmation with the updated terms is attached. The yearly saving comes to three hundred and forty. We have also noted the maker discount on your next silver sheet order. Let us know if you need anything else.

Rio Grande Supply
snippet: Done, you are on the maker tier and the confirmation with the updated terms is a...
subject: Re: Order shipped and account renewal

body:
Sam, I was going over the consignment statement for last month and something does not add up. The gallery sheet shows nine pieces sold but the cheque only covers seven. That is a difference of about two hundred and twenty after my commission. Before I take it up with the front desk, did you collect two pieces back yourself that I might have missed.

Angela
snippet: Sam, I was going over the consignment statement for last month and something doe...
subject: Consignment statement query

body:
I did not collect any pieces back, all nine were on the floor as far as I know. Ask the front desk for the itemised sales log against the inventory sheet so we can see which two are unaccounted for. Be polite but firm, and copy me in. If they cannot square it we ask for a corrected statement before anything else. Good catch.

Sam
snippet: I did not collect any pieces back, all nine were on the floor as far as I know. ...
subject: Re: Consignment statement query

body:
Hey Dad, I got my learner's permit paperwork sorted and I want to talk through the next bit before I decide. Driving school is offering the full twelve-lesson package up front, or a pay-as-you-go where I book lessons one at a time. The package is cheaper per lesson but locks the money in. I am torn. What would you do.

Kai
snippet: Hey Dad, I got my learner's permit paperwork sorted and I want to talk through t...
subject: Driving lessons

body:
It comes down to whether you will stick with it. If you are set on getting your licence this winter, take the package, you save per lesson and you are committed, which is half the battle. Pay-as-you-go only makes sense if you think you will stop and start. Either way I will take you out in the truck on the back roads between lessons so it sticks. What does your gut say.

Dad
snippet: It comes down to whether you will stick with it. If you are set on getting your ...
subject: Re: Driving lessons

body:
Gut says go for it. I want my licence before the end of winter so I can drive myself to chemistry club. I will take the package. And yes please to the back roads in the F-150, just do not laugh at my parking. Thanks for helping me think it through. I will book it this week.

Kai
snippet: Gut says go for it. I want my licence before the end of winter so I can drive my...
subject: Re: Driving lessons

body:
Sam, this month's notes for the group. First, the December meteor shower peaks the night of the thirteenth, the new moon means dark skies, best viewing after midnight out past the city lights. Second, a short piece on collimating a Dobsonian that is worth a read before you next take the scope out. Links below. Hope the skies are clear your way.

Gallup Stargazers
snippet: Sam, this month's notes for the group. First, the December meteor shower peaks t...
subject: Stargazers — this month's notes

body:
Thanks for these. I read the collimation piece over coffee, useful, I have been chasing a soft focus for weeks and that is likely the cause. I will take Kai out past the mesa for the shower on the thirteenth if the sky holds. Might bring the scope along. Keep the notes coming, I always read them.

Sam
snippet: Thanks for these. I read the collimation piece over coffee, useful, I have been ...
subject: Re: Stargazers — this month's notes

body:
Glad the collimation note helped, that soft focus is nearly always the secondary being a touch off. If you bring the scope out on the thirteenth, the section past the mesa by the old windmill has the darkest horizon to the east, good for catching the radiant low down. A few of the group will be out there too if you want company.

Gallup Stargazers
snippet: Glad the collimation note helped, that soft focus is nearly always the secondary...
subject: Re: Stargazers — this month's notes

body:
The windmill spot sounds right, dark to the east is what I want. We will likely come out for it, Kai is keen and it gets her off her phone for an evening. Can you send the rough time for the peak again, I want to time the drive so we are set up before it picks up. Thanks.

Sam
snippet: The windmill spot sounds right, dark to the east is what I want. We will likely ...
subject: Re: Stargazers — this month's notes

body:
Hi Dad, can you help me sort the lifts for the next two weeks. I have chemistry club Tuesday and Thursday until five, and the bus does not run that late from the high school. Martha said she could take me one of the days if you are on shift. I have a study group across town on Wednesday too. Are you able to cover any of the afternoons.

Kai
snippet: Hi Dad, can you help me sort the lifts for the next two weeks. I have chemistry ...
subject: Lifts for the next two weeks

body:
I can do Tuesday, I am off the floor by half four and will be outside the school at five. Wednesday is harder, I may still be at the briefing. Take Martha up on her offer for the Wednesday study group if she can. Thursday I should be clear, I will get you from chemistry club and we can grab food after.

Dad
snippet: I can do Tuesday, I am off the floor by half four and will be outside the school...
subject: Re: Lifts for the next two weeks

body:
Tuesday and Thursday are a big help, thank you. I asked Martha and she can take me to the Wednesday study group and drop me home after, so we are covered there. Thursday food sounds good. Can we do the diner again, I have been thinking about that green chile since last week.

Kai
snippet: Tuesday and Thursday are a big help, thank you. I asked Martha and she can take ...
subject: Re: Lifts for the next two weeks

body:
Diner it is on Thursday. Bring your chemistry notes if you have a test coming, I can quiz you over the stew. I will be outside both days at five sharp, watch for the truck. Tell Martha I owe her one for the Wednesday run.

Dad
snippet: Diner it is on Thursday. Bring your chemistry notes if you have a test coming, I...
subject: Re: Lifts for the next two weeks

body:
Will do, I have a test Friday so the quizzing actually helps. I will pass the message to Martha. Thanks Dad, you are the best. See you Tuesday at five.

Kai
snippet: Will do, I have a test Friday so the quizzing actually helps. I will pass the me...
subject: Re: Lifts for the next two weeks

body:
Sam, the youth programme is running the winter session at the rec centre and I would like you back on the metalworking bench like last year. The kids got more out of your two evenings than anything else we ran. We are looking at January and February, one evening a week. Can you commit, and how many benches can you set up.

Martha
snippet: Sam, the youth programme is running the winter session at the rec centre and I w...
subject: Winter mentoring session

body:
Count me in for January and February, Wednesday evenings suit best with my shifts. I can bring four bench setups and enough tooling for eight if they pair up. I will keep it to basics, stamping and a simple cuff, so they each finish a piece. Send me the start date and the age range and I will plan the projects around it.

Sam
snippet: Count me in for January and February, Wednesday evenings suit best with my shift...
subject: Re: Winter mentoring session

body:
Hey Dad, any plans this weekend. I was thinking we could get back to the F-150, the brake lines we ordered finally turned up. Or if the weather is bad we could just watch the bench and you can teach me to solder properly, I keep burning the flux. Either way I want to do something together. Saturday morning.

Kai
snippet: Hey Dad, any plans this weekend. I was thinking we could get back to the F-150, ...
subject: Weekend plans

body:
Let us do the brake lines Saturday morning while it is cool, then the soldering after lunch if your hands are not too greasy. You are not burning the flux, you are running the torch too close, I will show you. I will have Copper in the yard. Be up by eight, we lose the light early.

Dad
snippet: Let us do the brake lines Saturday morning while it is cool, then the soldering ...
subject: Re: Weekend plans

body:
Eight works, and I want to learn the torch properly this time. I will bring the coffee out to the studio. See you Saturday morning, Dad.

Kai
snippet: Eight works, and I want to learn the torch properly this time. I will bring the ...
subject: Re: Weekend plans

Angela, yes. Four cuffs (two heavy #8, one Kingman, one Royston) and two bolos in stamped sterling. Ship-ready 4 December. Consignment terms same as last year.

Sam
